title: Antigravity 3.0 (New Upgrades): Gemini 3.6, Agent Team-Up Option, Workbench, Low Thinking Effort
summary: Google released Antigravity 3.0 with multi-agent teamwork capabilities across all paid plans, a new Science Skills bundle for research workflows, improved Gemini 3.5 Flash models, and session syncing between CLI and desktop. The platform now supports specialized subagents running in parallel and integrates with scientific databases like AlphaFold, PubMed, and ChEMBL.
